creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
> Everything seems OK except that the patch references a non-existing `patch-scripts_CMakeLists.txt` file (one underscore) which I had to correct manually to `patch-scripts__CMakeLists.txt` (two underscores). Not sure how did it happen.

That's probably because file was renamed (patch-scripts__CMakeLists.txt -> patch-scripts_CMakeLists.txt) according to our patch naming scheme (https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/slow-patch.html).

> I am not a committer. Can you commit the changes

Sure, only your approval was required. Thank you!
